CREATE TABLE test_uuids (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT);
SELECT id, name FROM test_uuids WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_uuids WHERE name = 'Alice');
SELECT name FROM test_uuids WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_uuids WHERE name LIKE 'B%');
CREATE TABLE uuid_summary AS SELECT uuid_extract_version(id) AS version, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_uuids GROUP BY version;
SELECT id, uuid_extract_version(id) AS version FROM test_uuids WHERE uuid_extract_version(id) = 4;
CREATE TABLE uuidv7_timestamps AS SELECT uuidv7() AS uuid_value, uuid_extract_timestamp(uuidv7()) AS generated_time;
SELECT U1.id, U2.name FROM test_uuids U1 JOIN test_uuids U2 ON U1.id <> U2.id WHERE uuid_extract_version(U1.id) = 4;
WITH UUIDs AS (SELECT id, uuid_extract_version(id) AS version FROM test_uuids) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UUIDs WHERE version = 4;
SELECT id, name FROM test_uuids WHERE uuid_extract_version(id) IN (SELECT DISTINCT uuid_extract_version(id) FROM test_uuids);
CREATE TABLE uuid_test (uuid_col UUID NOT NULL);
SELECT uuid_col, uuid_extract_version(uuid_col) AS version FROM uuid_test WHERE version = 4;
